form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. McConnell submitted the following resolution; which was considered and agreed to

form.official-title: Making minority party appointments for the Select Committee on Ethics for the 110th Congress.

section.text: That the following be the minority membership on the Select Committee on Ethics for the remainder of the 110th Congress, or until their successors are appointed:

subsection.text: Mr. Cornyn, Mr. Roberts, and Mr. Isakson.
